creator: glewis@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Thanks for the submission.  I've decided not to make some of the suggested 
portlint based changes.  The changes to MASTER_SITE_DIR would actually make 
the port unfetchable, so that would be bad :).  The patch renaming should be 
done with a repo copy to preserve history, so if I decide to do that I'll 
do it that way.
